subcodes.first_line: Lo, the letters cry out from the divine Lote-Tree of utterance: "Verily there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Knowing!" The world hath been set ablaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الحروف تنادی فی سدره الکلام انه لا اله الا هو العزیز العلام قد اشتعل العالم من نار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Greatest Name, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
